description: LEO satellite modem/terminal service contract v1 — 9 operations across telemetry, signal quality, and hardware control for Starlink, OneWeb, Kuiper, and similar LEO terminals.

operations.description: Terminal identity, connectivity state, throughput, signal quality, and uptime
operations.name: status

operations.description: Active hardware and environment alert flags with descriptions
operations.name: alerts

operations.description: Signal obstruction data — directional map, fraction obstructed, timing
operations.name: obstruction

operations.description: Recent throughput, latency, and power telemetry (raw or summarised)
operations.name: history

operations.description: Hardware version, firmware, self-test results, alignment stats
operations.name: diagnostics

operations.description: Terminal GPS coordinates (may require user opt-in)
operations.name: location

operations.description: Stow or unstow the terminal for storage or transport
operations.name: stow

operations.description: Read or configure power-save sleep schedule
operations.name: power_schedule

title: leo-modem-v1
